caption: A person wearing a pink sleeveless shirt and dark shorts jumps toward a basketball hoop inside an indoor gymnasium. The setting features white walls, blue lower wall panels, a polished wooden floor, and a set of bleachers. In the initial sequence, the individual leaps into the air, holding a basketball high with both hands as they approach the hoop. As the action progresses, they release the ball toward the rim while reaching their peak height. Finally, the person descends back toward the court floor as the basketball travels through the air toward the basket. A black trash can and a red equipment bag are visible against the blue wall in the background. There is no on-screen text or visible logos throughout the sequence.
